private.heading: Shielded Transaction Routing.
private.subtitle: Break the on-chain link between sender and receiver. Your funds are routed through shielded liquidity paths for clean, private delivery.

step2.title: Shield

step3.title: Precise Settlement

whitepaper.metaTitle: Permanent Bridge Architecture — Institutional Whitepaper | MRC Global Pay
whitepaper.metaDesc: How does stateless address persistence enable automated institutional settlement? MRC Global Pay's Permanent Bridge eliminates ephemeral exchange sessions for corporate treasuries and mining operations.
whitepaper.heroTitle: Infrastructure Persistence and Automated Settlement Rails for Global Institutional Liquidity
whitepaper.heroSub: Shifting from ephemeral session-based exchanges to permanent, non-custodial settlement infrastructure that remains active indefinitely.
whitepaper.s1Title: Operational Fragility in Ephemeral Exchange Models
whitepaper.s1Body: In the current digital asset landscape, the transactional event model—where a unique deposit address is generated for a single, time-bound swap—introduces systemic operational fragility for corporate treasuries, industrial mining operations, and international consultancies. The 20-minute expiration window of traditional exchanges is a friction point that invites human error, administrative bloat, and settlement failure. When liquidity is ephemeral, infrastructure is broken.
whitepaper.s2Title: The Shift from Event-Based to Persistent Settlement
whitepaper.s2Body: MRC Global Pay has engineered the Permanent Bridge to transform fragmented liquidity into a permanent financial utility. By shifting from ephemeral session-based exchanges to Infrastructure Persistence, we provide a non-custodial settlement rail that remains active indefinitely.
whitepaper.vp1Desc: Eliminate the need to interact with a UI for every transaction. Once the bridge is established, it functions as a silent, automated background process.
whitepaper.vp2Desc: Scale operations without increasing headcount. A single permanent address can handle thousands of discrete inflows without manual intervention.
whitepaper.vp3Desc: Reduce the surface area for copy-paste errors and expired session timeouts that lead to lost funds.
whitepaper.s3Title: Stateless Address Persistence and Deterministic Routing
whitepaper.s3Body: The bridge architecture utilizes a Stateless Mapping Protocol that decouples the deposit endpoint from the user session. Unlike custodial platforms that hold assets in internal ledgers, MRC Global Pay utilizes Immutable Tethering.
whitepaper.tw1Desc: Upon initialization, a unique deposit address is cryptographically tethered to a pre-verified, external destination wallet. This link is hard-coded into the routing logic for that specific bridge instance.
whitepaper.tw2Desc: When the mempool detects an incoming hash to the bridge address, the protocol automatically triggers a swap via optimized liquidity paths.
whitepaper.tw3Desc: The asset conversion occurs in a single logical execution block. The settled funds are pushed to the destination wallet instantly upon network confirmation.
whitepaper.tw4Desc: No sensitive destination data is stored on centralized servers. The Permanent Bridge Receipt (PDF) serves as the stateless technical record, ensuring User Sovereignty.
whitepaper.miningDesc: Direct ASIC rewards to a Permanent Bridge for automatic hedging into stablecoins. Whitelist once in pool settings — bypass repeated secondary approvals.
whitepaper.corpDesc: Provide a single permanent address to global clients. They pay in their preferred asset; you receive settled value in your functional currency, fully automated.
whitepaper.hnwiDesc: Establish persistent conversion rails between volatile holdings and stablecoin reserves. Rebalance without touching a UI or creating new sessions.

shieldedWp.metaTitle: Shielded Settlement Architecture — Institutional Whitepaper | MRC Global Pay
shieldedWp.metaDesc: How does liquidity network decoupling protect corporate privacy? MRC Global Pay's shielded routing breaks on-chain identity linkability for institutional treasuries.
shieldedWp.heroTitle: Decoupling On-Chain Identity: Shielded Settlement Architecture for Corporate Privacy Sovereignty
shieldedWp.heroSub: Breaking the deterministic link between source and destination wallets through non-custodial liquidity network routing.
shieldedWp.s1Title: The Systemic Risk of Public Ledger Transparency
shieldedWp.s1Body: Every on-chain transaction creates a permanent, immutable record linking sender to receiver. For corporate treasuries and high-net-worth individuals, this transparency is a systemic liability. Wallet Fingerprinting and Heuristic Analysis allow third parties to map corporate net worth, AUM, vendor relationships, and payroll structures through a single transaction. A single deposit to a known exchange can expose an entire balance sheet. The blockchain's greatest strength — transparency — becomes its greatest vulnerability for institutional actors.
shieldedWp.s2Title: Liquidity Network Decoupling: Traceability Interruption at Scale
shieldedWp.s2Body: MRC Global Pay's Shielded Settlement Architecture implements a three-phase decoupling protocol that mathematically interrupts the deterministic link between source and destination addresses.
shieldedWp.ph1Desc: Funds enter the MRC Liquidity Layer through non-custodial routing. The input transaction is indistinguishable from standard exchange traffic, providing plausible deniability at the protocol level.
shieldedWp.ph2Desc: The protocol applies mathematical interruption of the deterministic link between source and destination. Funds are routed through randomized liquidity paths with variable timing and split amounts, making heuristic tracing computationally infeasible.
shieldedWp.ph3Desc: Settlement originates from neutral liquidity nodes with no traceable connection to the input address. The destination wallet receives clean funds from a source that cannot be reverse-engineered to the original sender.
shieldedWp.s3Title: Shielded Settlement Rails Are Not Mixers
shieldedWp.s3Body: It is critical to distinguish between high-risk 'Mixers' — which pool illicit and legitimate funds indiscriminately — and Shielded Settlement Rails, which are institutional-grade privacy infrastructure. MRC Global Pay's architecture maintains full compliance with global AML standards while providing User Sovereignty: the right of legitimate actors to transact without exposing their entire financial topology to public surveillance. This is Non-Custodial Integrity — at no point does MRC Global Pay take custody of user funds. The protocol routes, converts, and settles within a single atomic execution.
shieldedWp.maDesc: Secure capital movement during sensitive acquisitions. Prevent counterparties, competitors, or media from tracking treasury flows that could reveal deal terms or acquisition targets.
shieldedWp.payrollDesc: Shield compensation flows for C-suite and high-level staff. Prevent public wallet analysis from exposing individual compensation packages or organizational salary structures.
shieldedWp.insulationDesc: Move funds between cold storage and hot wallets without creating a public trail that links your security infrastructure to your operational addresses.

sovereignWp.metaTitle: The Sovereign Settlement — Institutional Whitepaper | MRC Global Pay
sovereignWp.metaDesc: How does stateless invoicing bypass correspondent banking? MRC Global Pay's Sovereign Settlement protocol provides 168-hour exchange rate certainty for global commerce.
sovereignWp.heroTitle: The Sovereign Settlement: Erasing the Friction of Global Commerce
sovereignWp.heroSub: The legacy financial system is no longer a facilitator of trade; it is a tax on it. MRC Global Pay introduces Stateless Invoicing — a protocol designed to bypass correspondent banking and provide 168-hour exchange rate certainty.
sovereignWp.s1Tag: Section I — The Illusion of Liquidity
sovereignWp.s1Title: Traditional Banking Is Failing Global Commerce
sovereignWp.s1Body: Traditional banking relies on a fragile web of Vostro and Nostro accounts. This 'Ghost in the Machine' creates an illusion of liquidity while hiding systemic delays and predatory intermediary fees. Whether you are using an LTC Transaction Tracker to monitor movement or waiting on a standard wire, the friction remains the same. We replace human trust with mathematical certainty. By utilizing an ETH to SOL bridge architecture for high-speed cross-chain movement, we ensure that capital is never 'stuck' in the pipes of a legacy bank.
sovereignWp.s2Tag: Section II — The 168-Hour Immutable Rate Lock
sovereignWp.s2Title: A 7-Day Volatility Shield for Global Settlement
sovereignWp.s2Body: Volatility is the primary deterrent for corporate digital asset adoption. In the time it takes to settle a gold or iron ore contract, market fluctuations can erase profit margins. MRC Global Pay eliminates this risk with a 7-Day Volatility Shield.
sovereignWp.lockDesc: Once an invoice is generated, the exchange rate is frozen for 168 hours. This provides the stability of a Letter of Credit without the bank fee.
sovereignWp.guaranteeDesc: We absorb the market movement, ensuring that the amount sent is exactly the amount received. No surprises, no renegotiation.
sovereignWp.s3Tag: Section III — Privacy and Financial Sovereignty
sovereignWp.s3Body: In an era of increasing financial surveillance, maintaining a Direct Responsibility Framework is essential for the global elite. We recognize the need for privacy-centric tools, providing the best way to buy Monero no KYC logic — where the user retains total control over their data and their assets. Sovereignty isn't just about owning your money; it's about owning the speed and privacy at which it moves.
sovereignWp.s4Title: What You See Is What You Get
sovereignWp.s4Body: We have eliminated the 'hidden fee' culture of fintech. Transparency is our priority. Our 0.5% fee is baked into the quoted rate.
sovereignWp.feeDesc: All operational costs are baked into the quoted rate. No additional charges, no surprises.
sovereignWp.gasDesc: We handle the complexity of the underlying blockchain networks. You never pay extra for gas.
sovereignWp.finalityDesc: Settlement happens at the speed of the protocol, not the speed of a bank's working hours.
sovereignWp.ctaDesc: Generate a rate-locked invoice in under 30 seconds. 6,000+ Cryptocurrencies & Tokenized Stocks, 168-hour certainty, zero registration.

lendGuide.safetySubtitle: Institutional-grade security backed by Canadian MSB compliance

loanFaq.q1: What happens if the price of my collateral drops?
loanFaq.a1: All loan positions are monitored 24/7 by our infrastructure partner's automated risk engine. If your collateral value enters the Yellow (Risk) zone, the partner's system will automatically trigger instant SMS and email alerts to your registered contact details with instructions to adjust your position. To protect the lending pool, the partner's engine will execute a liquidation if the value falls into the Red (Liquidation) zone without action. Disclaimer: MRC Global Pay provides the interface for these services; monitoring, alert delivery, and liquidation execution are managed exclusively by our technology partner.
loanFaq.a2: No. The only cost is the transparent interest rate (APR) displayed before you confirm the loan. There are no origination fees, no monthly service charges, and no early repayment penalties.
loanFaq.a3: Interest is based on the Annual Percentage Rate (APR) specific to your collateral asset and chosen LTV tier. It accrues daily and is added to the total repayment amount. There are no monthly payment schedules — you repay the full amount (principal + accrued interest) whenever you are ready.
loanFaq.q4: Can I repay my loan early?
loanFaq.a4: Yes. There are absolutely no early repayment penalties. Repay the principal plus accrued interest at any time, and your collateral is unlocked and returned to you instantly.
loanFaq.q5: What LTV ratio should I choose?
loanFaq.a5: It depends on your risk tolerance. A 50% LTV gives you the largest safety buffer against price drops and the lowest interest rate, but fewer upfront funds. A 90% LTV maximizes your borrowing power but has a tighter liquidation margin. For most users, 70% offers a balanced middle ground.
loanFaq.q6: Is there a minimum or maximum loan amount?
loanFaq.a6: The minimum depends on the collateral asset and is displayed in the calculator. There is no hard maximum — larger positions may undergo additional compliance review in accordance with Canadian MSB regulations.

earnFaq.a1: No. MRC Global Pay Earn is completely flexible. You can withdraw your full principal and all earned interest at any time, 24/7, with no penalties and no withdrawal fees.
earnFaq.a2: Interest is accrued daily and automatically compounded into your balance. Your earnings generate additional yield over time without any manual action.
earnFaq.a3: You can start earning with as little as $100 equivalent, depending on the selected asset.
earnFaq.a4: All funds are secured in multisig cold-storage wallets with a strict no-rehypothecation policy — your assets are never lent out or traded. The platform operates under the oversight of a registered Canadian MSB (C100000015).
earnFaq.q5: Are there any hidden fees or charges?
earnFaq.a5: No. There are no deposit fees, no withdrawal fees, and no management charges. The APY displayed is the net rate you earn.

lendGuide.riskZoneTip: All loan positions are monitored 24/7 by our infrastructure partner's automated risk engine. If your collateral value enters the Yellow (Risk) zone, the partner's system will automatically trigger instant SMS and email alerts to your registered contact details with instructions to adjust your position. To protect the lending pool, the partner's engine will execute a liquidation if the value falls into the Red (Liquidation) zone without action.
lendGuide.riskZoneDisclaimer: Disclaimer: MRC Global Pay provides the interface for these services; monitoring, alert delivery, and liquidation execution are managed exclusively by our technology partner.

portal.metaTitle: Institutional Partner Portal | MRC Global Pay
portal.metaDesc: Secure MRC Global Pay partner dashboard with TOTP 2FA, encrypted API key management, real-time transaction monitoring, and lifetime BTC commission tracking.
portal.docsAmountDesc: Amount of from_currency to swap. Minimum $0.30 equivalent.
portal.docsAmountOutDesc: Final amount delivered to the recipient.
portal.docsApiKeyDesc: An active API key generated in the API Keys section.
portal.docsAuthDesc: All API requests must include two headers to identify and authenticate your integration. Requests missing either header will receive a 401 Unauthorized response.
portal.docsAuthNote: API keys are bound to your partner account. Each key can optionally be restricted to specific IP addresses via the whitelist in API Keys settings.
portal.docsCommissionDesc: Your earned commission on this transaction (BTC).
portal.docsCommissionDesc2: All transactions routed through the Partner API are subject to an automated 0.4% commission, calculated on the total transaction volume and credited in BTC.
portal.docsLedgerDesc: Each transaction is logged with a unique MRC Transaction ID, volume, commission, and payment status. Review your full ledger in the API Ledger section.
portal.docsPartnerIdDesc: Your unique Partner ID from the Partner Hub overview.
portal.docsRecipientDesc: Destination wallet address for the converted funds.
portal.docsResponseDesc: On success, returns 200 with the internal MRC transaction ID and a deposit address. The partner must instruct the end-user to send funds to the payin_address.
portal.docsSettlement1: Commissions accrue in real-time to your Available Balance.
portal.docsSettlement2: Completed transactions auto-credit to the BTC wallet on your partner profile.
portal.docsSettlement3: Pending settlements are visible in the API Ledger under 'Pending Settlement'.
portal.docsStep1: Extract the X-MRC-Signature header from the incoming request.
portal.docsStep2: Compute HMAC-SHA256 of the raw JSON body using your API Secret.
portal.docsStep3: Compare your computed signature with the header value. Reject if they differ.
portal.docsSwapDesc: Initiate a swap order through the MRC liquidity proxy. The system validates your credentials, logs the transaction internally, and relays the order to our liquidity network.
portal.docsWebhookDesc: When a transaction status changes, MRC dispatches a POST request to your configured Webhook URL. Each payload is signed with HMAC-SHA256 using your API Secret as the key.
portal.tryItDesc: Execute a mock swap to preview the JSON response and webhook dispatch behavior.

dynamicExchange.snippetBody: Enter your amount, paste your {{to}} wallet address, and send {{from}} to the deposit address. Your {{to}} arrives in {{settlement}}. Registration-free, no account required, no minimum beyond $0.30 USD.
dynamicExchange.aggregatorNote: MRC Global Pay aggregates rates from 700+ liquidity sources to find the best {{from}}/{{to}} exchange rate in real time. We are a Canadian MSB (C100000015) operating non-custodial swaps — your funds are never held by us.
dynamicExchange.howToTitle: How to Convert {{from}} to {{to}} — Step by Step
dynamicExchange.howToSubtitle: Complete your {{from}} to {{to}} swap in 4 simple steps. No downloads, no sign-ups, no identity checks.
dynamicExchange.step1Desc: Choose {{fromName}} as the source and {{toName}} as the destination in the swap widget above. The exchange rate updates in real time.
dynamicExchange.step2Desc: Type the amount of {{from}} you want to convert. The minimum is ~$0.30 USD equivalent — we support micro-swaps for converting dust balances.
dynamicExchange.step3Desc: Provide the {{toName}} address where you want to receive funds. Double-check the address — blockchain transactions are irreversible.
dynamicExchange.step3MemoNote: Important: {{toName}} requires a Memo/Destination Tag — you'll be prompted to enter it.
dynamicExchange.step4Desc: Send your {{from}} to the one-time deposit address we generate. After {{confirmations}} network confirmation(s) (typically {{fromSettlement}}), your {{to}} is sent to your wallet automatically. Expected delivery: {{toSettlement}}.
dynamicExchange.whyStableToVolatile: exit a stable position and gain exposure to {{toName}}'s price movements.
dynamicExchange.whyVolatileToStable: lock in your {{from}} gains by moving into a stable, dollar-pegged asset.
dynamicExchange.whyFromBtc: diversify beyond Bitcoin into {{toName}}'s ecosystem and use cases.
dynamicExchange.whyToBtc: consolidate your holdings into Bitcoin, the most liquid and widely-accepted cryptocurrency.
dynamicExchange.whyGeneric: rebalance your portfolio between two distinct blockchain ecosystems with different utility and risk profiles.
dynamicExchange.whySwapOutro: On MRC Global Pay, this swap settles in {{settlement}} with no slippage beyond the rate shown — what you see is what you get.
dynamicExchange.networkSubtitle: Technical specifications for the {{from}}/{{to}} swap pair. Verify contract addresses before sending funds.
dynamicExchange.settlementInfraDesc: This swap is executed through institutional-grade liquidity rails aggregating 700+ providers. The process is non-custodial (your funds transit directly between wallets), forensic-verified, and compliant with Canadian FINTRAC regulations.
dynamicExchange.trustTitle: Why Trade {{from}}/{{to}} on MRC Global Pay?
dynamicExchange.trustNoAccountDesc: Start swapping in seconds. No email, no phone number, no selfie. Just enter your amount and wallet address.
dynamicExchange.trustNonCustodialDesc: Your private keys stay with you. We never hold your funds — every swap is a direct wallet-to-wallet settlement.
dynamicExchange.trustMsbDesc: Operated by MRC Pay International Corp., registered with FINTRAC (MSB #C100000015). Fully compliant, fully transparent.
dynamicExchange.trustBestRateDesc: Our engine queries 700+ liquidity sources in real time and routes your swap to the best rate. No hidden fees or spreads.
dynamicExchange.faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know about converting {{fromName}} to {{toName}}.
dynamicExchange.faqMinQ: What is the minimum amount of {{from}} I can swap for {{to}}?
dynamicExchange.faqMinA: The minimum swap amount is approximately $0.30 USD equivalent in {{from}}. MRC Global Pay is specifically designed to handle micro-swaps and "crypto dust" — small leftover balances that other exchanges refuse to process. The exact minimum fluctuates with market prices and is always displayed in the swap widget before you confirm.
dynamicExchange.faqTimeQ: How long does a {{from}} to {{to}} swap take?
dynamicExchange.faqTimeA: The total time depends on {{fromName}}'s network confirmation speed. {{from}} typically requires {{confirmations}} confirmation(s), which takes {{fromSettlement}}. Once confirmed, your {{to}} is sent within seconds. End-to-end, most swaps complete in under 2 minutes.
dynamicExchange.faqMemoQ: Does {{to}} require a Memo, Tag, or Extra ID?
dynamicExchange.faqMemoYes: Yes. {{toName}} uses an additional identifier (called a Memo, Destination Tag, or Extra ID depending on the network). You will be prompted to enter it during the swap process. Failing to include this identifier will result in permanent loss of funds — there is no way to recover them.
dynamicExchange.faqMemoNo: No. {{toName}} does not require a Memo, Destination Tag, or Extra ID. You only need to provide your {{to}} wallet address. However, always double-check the address — blockchain transactions are irreversible.
dynamicExchange.faqKycQ: Do I need to create an account or verify my identity to swap {{from}} to {{to}}?
dynamicExchange.faqKycA: No. MRC Global Pay does not require account creation, email registration, or identity verification (KYC) for standard cryptocurrency swaps. We are a registered Canadian Money Services Business (MSB Identifier: C100000015, FINTRAC-supervised), which allows us to provide fully compliant non-custodial swap services without imposing KYC requirements on individual users.
dynamicExchange.faqFeesQ: What fees does MRC Global Pay charge for {{from}} to {{to}}?
dynamicExchange.faqFeesA: There are no hidden fees. The exchange rate displayed in the swap widget includes a small service fee and the blockchain network fee required to send your {{to}}. There is no withdrawal fee, no deposit fee, and no spread markup beyond what is shown. The rate you see is the rate you get.
dynamicExchange.faqSafeQ: Is it safe to use MRC Global Pay to swap {{from}} to {{to}}?
dynamicExchange.faqSafeA: Yes. MRC Global Pay operates a fully non-custodial service — we never take custody of your funds or private keys. Your {{from}} is exchanged directly through audited liquidity partners and sent to your {{to}} address. The platform is operated by MRC Pay International Corp., a FINTRAC-registered MSB headquartered in Ottawa, Ontario, Canada.
dynamicExchange.faqNetworkQ: What blockchain network should I use to send {{from}}?
dynamicExchange.faqNetworkA: For this swap, {{fromName}} uses the {{network}} network. Ensure your sending wallet is compatible with this network. Sending {{from}} on an incompatible network will result in permanent loss of funds.
dynamicExchange.relatedSubtitle: Swap between any of the {{assetCount}} most popular cryptocurrencies — instantly, no registration.
dynamicExchange.ctaSubtitle: Registration-free. No account required. Under 60 seconds. Canadian MSB-registered.

Hey [FIRST-NAME],

If you've been in crypto for more than five minutes, you know the pattern:

→ Centralized exchanges are fast but custodial (and increasingly KYC-everything)
→ DEX aggregators are non-custodial but slow, expensive, and chain-limited

blog.post:
# The Best Non-Custodial Crypto Swap Platform in 2026

If you've spent any time in crypto recently, you've felt the squeeze: centralized exchanges keep tightening KYC, "no-KYC" platforms look increasingly suspicious, and decentralized aggregators are still too slow and chain-limited for everyday use.

There's finally a better option — and after testing it for several months, I'm convinced it's the most well-balanced non-custodial swap platform available in 2026.

## Meet MRC Global Pay

[MRC Global Pay]([YOUR-AFFILIATE-LINK]) is a non-custodial cryptocurrency exchange operated by MRC Pay International Corp, headquartered in Ottawa, Canada. Unlike most "anonymous" swap sites, it has a real corporate entity behind it — but it isn't a centralized exchange. Your funds never sit on the platform. Every swap is an atomic, non-custodial transaction, and you don't need an account to swap.

## Why It Stands Out

Here's what makes it different from every other swap I've tested:

- **6,000+ trading pairs** across Bitcoin, Ethereum, Solana, BNB Chain, TRON, and dozens more.
- **Sub-60-second swap times.** Most transactions settle in under a minute.
- **Micro-swaps from just $0.30.** Almost no platform supports amounts this small — perfect for clearing dust on multi-chain wallets.
- **Zero account required for swaps.** Sign-up is only needed if you want to use the partner or affiliate tools.
- **Real corporate operator.** A real entity behind the product, headquartered in Ottawa.

## Who Should Use It

If you fall into any of these groups, it's worth trying:

1. **Long-term holders** who occasionally rebalance and hate the friction of centralized exchanges.
2. **Multi-chain users** drowning in dust they can't otherwise convert.
3. **Self-custody advocates** who refuse to deposit funds anywhere.
4. **Creators and educators** who want a clean tool they can recommend.

## Try It Yourself

The fastest way to evaluate MRC Global Pay is to try a small swap — even $0.30 will show you the entire flow.

👉 **[Start a swap on MRC Global Pay →]([YOUR-AFFILIATE-LINK])**

In a market full of bad options, it's rare to find a tool that's simultaneously non-custodial, fast, and easy. MRC Global Pay is the first platform I've used in 2026 that ticks every box.

---

*Disclosure: The links above are affiliate links. If you swap through them, I may earn a small commission at no extra cost to you.*

nicehashWp.metaTitle: NiceHash Mining Payouts: The 2026 Off-Ramp Whitepaper | MRC GlobalPay
nicehashWp.metaDesc: A complete guide to every coin NiceHash mines and the cheapest, safest way to convert mining payouts into BTC, ETH, stablecoins, or yield-bearing positions — with no account required.
nicehashWp.heroTitle: From Hashrate to Wealth: The Smart Off-Ramp for NiceHash Miners
nicehashWp.heroSub: Every NiceHash payout is denominated in BTC — but BTC is rarely the asset you actually want to hold, spend, or earn yield on. This whitepaper maps every coin NiceHash mines and shows how to convert your hashpower into stablecoins, ETH, gold, or interest-bearing positions in under 90 seconds — without an account, KYC, or hidden spreads.
nicehashWp.heroAlt: NiceHash mining rig with BTC, ETH, LTC, KAS, XMR coins
nicehashWp.s1Title: NiceHash pays in BTC. That's a feature — and a tax.
nicehashWp.s1P1: NiceHash is the largest hashpower marketplace in the world. Whether you point an Antminer at SHA-256, a fleet of GPUs at Kaspa's kHeavyHash, or a single CPU at Monero's RandomX, NiceHash auto-converts the buyer's payment into Bitcoin and credits it to your internal wallet.
nicehashWp.s1P2: This is convenient — until you want to actually use the money. The moment you withdraw, you face three frictions:
nicehashWp.s1Bullet1: Withdrawal fees that scale with on-chain congestion (often $5–$25 in BTC network fees alone).
nicehashWp.s1Bullet2: Forced exposure to BTC volatility while your rig keeps producing — a 6% drop overnight can erase a week of margin.
nicehashWp.s1Bullet3: KYC walls on most centralized exchanges if you want to convert into stablecoins, fiat, or another asset.
nicehashWp.s1P3: Every miner eventually asks the same question: How do I move from BTC payouts into the asset I actually want, with the lowest possible spread, no account, and no surprise?
nicehashWp.s2Title: Every coin you can mine through NiceHash
nicehashWp.s2Sub: NiceHash supports 30+ algorithms across ASIC, GPU, and CPU rigs. Below is the complete 2026 working list grouped by algorithm. Every asset on the right column can be swapped to BTC / ETH / USDT / USDC / SOL / XMR / PAXG via the
nicehashWp.noteSha: ASIC-dominated. NiceHash auto-converts hashpower to BTC payouts.
nicehashWp.noteScrypt: Merge-mined Litecoin + Dogecoin via merged pools.
nicehashWp.noteEtchash: GPU mining after Ethereum's Merge. Etchash is the dominant choice.
nicehashWp.noteKaspa: Kaspa — most popular GPU coin of 2024-2026.
nicehashWp.noteErgo: Ergo — eUTXO smart contract platform, GPU-friendly.
nicehashWp.noteOctopus: Conflux — Tree-Graph chain with EVM compatibility.
nicehashWp.noteNexa: UTXO L1 with high TPS targets.
nicehashWp.s2Footer: Even if your specific coin isn't on this list, NiceHash settles in BTC — and BTC is the most liquid pair on MRC GlobalPay's
nicehashWp.s3Title: Why miners are routing payouts through MRC GlobalPay
nicehashWp.edgePricingDesc: What you see is what you get. The 0.5% service fee is already baked into the quoted rate — no FX markup, no withdrawal surcharge, no inactivity fee. Compare against typical CEX off-ramps that hide 1.5–3% in spread.
nicehashWp.edgeMsbDesc: MRC Pay International Corp is a FINTRAC-registered Money Services Business (Identifier C100000015), headquartered in Ottawa. Your transactions clear through audited rails — not anonymous offshore mixers.
nicehashWp.edgeNoAccountDesc: No sign-up. No KYC for crypto-to-crypto swaps. Paste your destination wallet, scan the deposit QR, and the converted asset lands in your wallet within minutes. Mining payouts deserve mining-grade speed.
nicehashWp.edgeRoutingDesc: Every quote is fetched in parallel from multiple liquidity providers. The smart router picks the highest payout automatically, then silently fails over if one provider rejects. Result: better rates than any single venue.
nicehashWp.edgePrivacyDesc: We never log your IP against your wallet. For miners who want to fully sever the link between their rig payout address and their treasury, the Private Transfer rail uses Monero as a shielded hop.
nicehashWp.edgeEarnPre: Don't let stables sit idle. Move converted USDT, USDC, BTC or ETH into the
nicehashWp.edgeEarnPost: and put your mining proceeds to work generating institutional yield while your rigs keep humming.
nicehashWp.comparePre: See exactly how MRC stacks up against the major venues miners typically use on the
nicehashWp.comparePost: — kept up to date with live fee data.
nicehashWp.s4Title: Which asset should your hashpower convert into?
nicehashWp.s4Sub: There is no single "best" payout asset — the right choice depends on your time horizon, electricity cost, and risk appetite. The seven profiles below cover ~95% of professional miners.
nicehashWp.payoutBtc: Long-term store of value. Lowest counterparty risk.
nicehashWp.payoutUsdt: Lock in fiat value instantly. TRC-20 = ~$0.50 fees.
nicehashWp.payoutSol: Sub-cent fees, high throughput, growing ecosystem.
nicehashWp.payoutXmr: Privacy default. Sever the on-chain link to your rig.
nicehashWp.payoutPaxg: Tokenized gold. Hedge against crypto drawdowns.
nicehashWp.rulePre: A common heuristic among professional GPU farms in 2026: convert 60% of weekly payouts into stablecoins (operating costs), 30% into BTC or ETH (long-term thesis), and 10% into a yield-bearing position via the
nicehashWp.rulePost: . MRC's batch swap flow lets you split a single BTC payout across all three destinations in one session.
nicehashWp.s5Title: Converting a NiceHash payout in 90 seconds
nicehashWp.step1: Withdraw from NiceHash to a personal BTC wallet (or use the Lightning rail for sub-cent fees on smaller balances).
nicehashWp.step2: Open the MRC GlobalPay widget. Select BTC as the source and your target asset (USDT, USDC, ETH, SOL, XMR, PAXG, etc.) as the destination.
nicehashWp.step3: Paste your destination address. The 60-second rate lock activates the moment a valid address is detected.
nicehashWp.step4: Send BTC to the deposit address shown. Multi-provider routing picks the best available rate at confirmation time.
nicehashWp.step5: Receive the converted asset directly in your wallet. Optionally, route stablecoins straight into the Lend & Earn portal for yield.
nicehashWp.s6Pre: Don't take our word for it. Read the full security disclosures, MSB registration details, liquidity partner stack, and on-chain settlement model on the
nicehashWp.s6Mid: page. For the underlying settlement architecture, see the
nicehashWp.ctaBadge: Built for miners, by people who run rigs
nicehashWp.ctaTitle: Stop bleeding margin on BTC withdrawals.
nicehashWp.ctaDesc: Convert your next NiceHash payout into the asset that actually matches your strategy — at the lowest fee in the industry, with no account, no KYC, and no surprise spreads.
